authority.rule: This registry is the provider-neutral reference surface for external harness adapters. Adapters may add discovery metadata, but workflow logic stays in the referenced .claude files.

surfaces.name: run-brainstorm
surfaces.purpose: Drive a full visual brainstorm session

surfaces.name: plan-closeout
surfaces.purpose: Close the active plan and feed learnings back into the repo

surfaces.name: discover-skills
surfaces.purpose: Find local skills or ingest new craft

surfaces.name: diagnose-studio
surfaces.purpose: Diagnose the studio, bridge, or MCP from evidence

surfaces.name: artifact-chat
surfaces.purpose: Route artifact questions and revisions through subagents

surfaces.name: reopen
surfaces.purpose: Move a completed thread back to live discussion and resume it

surfaces.name: build-check
surfaces.purpose: Run the canonical build and test verification

surfaces.name: new-command
surfaces.purpose: Codify recurring work as a new repeatable command

surfaces.name: create-dispatch-command
surfaces.purpose: Turn a plan into a loopable dispatcher command

surfaces.name: compress-learnings
surfaces.purpose: Weekly: compact the agentic learnings log (recent verbatim, older distilled, originals archived)

surfaces.name: brainstorm-phases
surfaces.purpose: Drive the five-phase funnel and interpret every response field

surfaces.name: svg-authoring
surfaces.purpose: Author divergent SVG board options and validate them

surfaces.name: brainstorm-orchestrator
surfaces.purpose: Primary brainstorm persona and orchestration owner

surfaces.name: devops-diagnostician
surfaces.purpose: Evidence-first diagnosis for studio, bridge, and MCP
